Maintain total compliance. Manage doctor registries, track patient billing securely, and avoid dead stock with automated batch expiry tracking.

Engineered for Healthcare Compliance

🩺 Doctor Registry

Assign prescriptions to specific doctors and manage clinic schedules with our dedicated registry system.

🔒 Patient Billing ledgers

Keep sensitive patient billing histories secure, accurate, and completely private with local-first data storage.

Automated stock alerts notify you before pharmacy items expire, ensuring safety and reducing waste.
